title: Storyboard Creation Algorithm
description: Steps to create an effective UX storyboard
code:
CREATE_STORYBOARD(user_goal, context)
BEGIN
 1. Define user persona and scenario
 2. List all touchpoints user encounters
 3. Sketch initial screen sequence (panels)
 4. Add user actions between panels
 5. Include user emotions at each step
 6. Identify decision points and branches
 7. Review for consistency with mental model
 8. Iterate based on feedback
 9. Finalize storyboard for validation
END
explanation: This algorithm outlines the systematic process for creating UX storyboards that align with user mental models.

complexity.time: O(n) where n is number of screens

title: Mental Model Validation Process
description: Check if design aligns with user mental models
code:
VALIDATE_DESIGN_MENTAL_MODEL(design_elements, user_expectations)
BEGIN
 FOR each design_element IN design_elements
 IF element matches user_expectations THEN
 mark as aligned
 ELSE
 flag as potential gulf
 suggest modification based on similar interfaces
 END IF
 END FOR
 Calculate alignment_score = (aligned / total_elements) * 100
 IF alignment_score < threshold THEN
 Return "Redesign needed"
 ELSE
 Return "Proceed to prototyping"
 END IF
END
explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to systematically validate whether design elements align with expected user mental models.

complexity.time: O(n) where n is number of elements
